fissile_core.title: Craft a Fissile Core — uranium automation via Create: Oppenheimered (5 Uranium + 1 Iron via Compactor)

subtitle.text: Uranium into the Crusher. Fissile Cores out. The Reactor runs forever if you keep feeding it. Do not stop feeding it.

description: CH.10 · ATOMIC POWER
▸ The Atomic Power scroll covers the full
nuclear fuel chain from ore to reactor output.
Create: Oppenheimered automates every step.
The reactor never starves if you build the chain.
◈ URANIUM FUEL CHAIN (Create: Oppenheimered)
└ Step 1: Mine alexscaves:radrock_uranium_ore
Found in Alex's Caves Radioactive biome
└ Step 2: Crushing Wheels → Uranium (100%) +
bonus Uranium (50%) + XP nugget (75%)
└ Step 3: 5 Uranium + 1 Iron → Compactor (superheated)
Output: 1-2x Fissile Core + 250 mB Acid
└ Step 4: Feed Fissile Cores into CNA Nuclear Reactor
Reactor outputs heat → Heat Pipes → Boiler → Steam
◈ WASTE RECYCLING LOOP
└ Fissile Core + Unrefined Waste →
Compactor (superheated) → 3x Uranium + 250 mB Acid
└ Close the loop: waste becomes fuel again
└ Acid byproduct: pipe into storage or dispose safely
└ Fully automated loop = infinite nuclear fuel cycle
◈ REACTOR OPERATION
└ CNA Nuclear Reactor generates heat (not SU directly)
└ Heat → Heat Pipes → Fluid Boiler → Steam → Engine
└ Alternatively: Reactor → Energiser for hybrid output
└ Backup: Solar Panel array for daytime FE when
reactor is offline for maintenance
◈ SCROLL: Atomic Power
└ Found in nuclear research structures,
Alex's Caves deep biome loot chests
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: full uranium → fissile → reactor chain,
waste recycling loop, reactor safety protocols
▸ The Engineers who built the first reactor
left detailed notes.
The notes are still in the ruins.
Partially.
The parts that survived are the scroll.
▶ Find The Atomic Power scroll [check]
▶ Craft a Fissile Core [check]
◇ Uranium ore also used in Nuclear Shell crafting.
Mine more than you think you need.
The fuel chain and the weapon chain overlap.
